sqlMap.select: select * from DocumentArchiveLW where VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
sqlMap.insert: insert into DocumentArchiveLW(VersionSequence, PolicyKey DocTitle Comment DocFileName LastUpdateUserID LastUpdateTimeStamp DocUrl UploadedType UploadedTime DocType CreatedDate CreatedBy VersionKey ) values (#VersionSequence:NUMERIC#, #PolicyKey:NUMERIC# #DocTitle# #Comment# #DocFileName# #LastUpdateUserID# #LastUpdateTimeStamp# #DocUrl# #UploadedType# #UploadedTime# #DocType# #CreatedDate# #CreatedBy# #VersionKey# ) SELECT IDENT_CURRENT('DocumentArchiveLW') as last_insert_id
sqlMap.select: select DocumentID, DocTitle, Comment, DocFileName, LastUpdateUserID, LastUpdateTimeStamp, DocUrl, UploadedType, UploadedTime, DocType, CreatedDate, CreatedBy, VersionKey, VersionSequence, PolicyKey from DocumentArchiveLW where DocumentID = #DocumentID# and VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
sqlMap.update:
update DocumentArchiveLW set
DocTitle = #DocTitle# DocTitle = null Comment = #Comment# Comment = null DocFileName = #DocFileName# DocFileName = null LastUpdateUserID = #LastUpdateUserID# LastUpdateUserID = null LastUpdateTimeStamp = #LastUpdateTimeStamp# LastUpdateTimeStamp = null DocUrl = #DocUrl# DocUrl = null UploadedType = #UploadedType# UploadedType = null UploadedTime = #UploadedTime# UploadedTime = null DocType = #DocType# DocType = null CreatedDate = #CreatedDate# CreatedDate = null CreatedBy = #CreatedBy# CreatedBy = null VersionKey = #VersionKey# VersionKey = null
where DocumentID = #DocumentID# and VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
sqlMap.delete: delete from DocumentArchiveLW where DocumentID = #DocumentID# and VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
delete from DocumentArchiveLW where VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
sqlMap.select: select DocumentID, DocTitle, Comment, DocFileName, LastUpdateUserID, LastUpdateTimeStamp, DocUrl, UploadedType, UploadedTime, DocType, CreatedDate, CreatedBy, VersionKey, VersionSequence, PolicyKey from DocumentArchiveLW where DocumentID = #DocumentID# and VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#

select DocumentID, VersionSequence, PolicyKey, DocTitle, Comment, DocFileName, LastUpdateUserID, LastUpdateTimeStamp, DocUrl, UploadedType, UploadedTime, DocType, CreatedDate, CreatedBy, VersionKey from DocumentArchiveLW where VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
